sections.paragraph:
ρ´ numerical sign=100 (ἑκατόν; Jos., C. Ap. 2, 134) Hv 4, 1, 6; GJs 4:3 pap.

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Hv Hv = Visions

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 902
